title: Self-Study-Tool Core Enhancements
description: Complete AI-powered learning platform with intelligent orchestration, adaptive scheduling, professional grading, and comprehensive profiling

tasks.title: Complete Schedule Service with AI Generation
tasks.description: Implement AI-powered schedule generation using user profile and course data. Add dynamic adjustment based on user requests.

tasks.title: Implement Agent Orchestration Service
tasks.description: Create head teacher agent that manages subject agents, dispatches tasks, and coordinates teaching activities.

tasks.title: Implement 10-Level Difficulty System
tasks.description: Create Gaokao-aligned difficulty assessment with 10 levels. Add difficulty assignment to questions.

tasks.title: Implement Professional Grading System
tasks.description: Create subject-specific grading with detailed feedback, error pinpointing, and scoring aligned with Gaokao standards.

tasks.title: Implement Intelligent Paper Generation
tasks.description: AI-powered test paper composition based on user progress with validation for correctness.

tasks.title: Add Multi-Format Material Support
tasks.description: Support PDF, images, MOBI formats with AI-powered classification and querying.

tasks.title: Enhance Mistake Analysis with AI
tasks.description: AI-powered error pattern analysis, weak point identification, and user profiling updates.

tasks.title: Wire All Services in Bootstrap
tasks.description: Integrate all new services into bootstrap, register routes, and ensure proper dependency injection.

acceptance_criteria: AI integration working with proper prompts
Git commit per task with clear messages
